docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,268.42 FILED BY SOKOLOV, TAMARA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT AJALA, TEMITOPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-08-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT TAMARA SOKOLOV & CROSS-DEFENDANT TEMITOPE AJALA. GRETA HULL & NANCY O'CALLAHAN, WITNESSES FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. GABRIEL OWUSU, A WITNESS FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SOKOLOV, TAMARA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF TEMITOPE AJALA & DEFENDANT TAMARA SOKOLOV. GABRIEL OWUSU, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFF, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. GRETA HULL & NANCY O'CALLAHAN, WITNESSES FOR DEFENDANT, WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO PROOF OF SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED CLAIM, BUT DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE OF SAME AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SOKOLOV, TAMARA RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT AJALA, TEMITOPE $1,044.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,114.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
